items.title: CVE-2026-5854 | Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024 CGI /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi setWiFiEasyCfg merge os command injection
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability identified as critical has been detected in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. Affected by this issue is the function setWiFiEasyCfg of the file /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi of the component CGI Handler. Performing a manipulation of the argument merge results in os command injection. This vulnerability is cataloged as CVE-2026-5854. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. Furthermore, there is an exploit available.

items.title: CVE-2026-5853 | Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024 CGI /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi setIpv6LanCfg addrPrefixLen os command injection
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability categorized as critical has been discovered in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. Affected by this vulnerability is the function setIpv6LanCfg of the file /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi of the component CGI Handler. items.content: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, was found in Linux Kernel up to 7.0-rc4. items.title: CVE-2026-5484 | BookStackApp BookStack up to 26.03 Chapter Export ExportFormatter.php chapterToMarkdown pages access control
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability categorized as problematic has been discovered in BookStackApp BookStack up to 26.03. Affected is the function chapterToMarkdown of the file app/Exports/ExportFormatter.php of the component Chapter Export Handler. Executing a manipulation of the argument pages can lead to improper access controls. This vulnerability is registered as CVE-2026-5484. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. Such manipulation of the argument Reason leads to http response splitting. This vulnerability is referenced as CVE-2026-34519. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. No exploit is available. The affected component should be upgraded.

items.title: CVE-2026-4101 | IBM Verify Identity Access Container up to 11.0.2 improper authentication
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability identified as critical has been detected in IBM Verify Identity Access Container, Security Verify Access Container, Verify Identity Access and Security Verify Access up to 11.0.2. This affects an unknown function. This manipulation causes improper authentication. The identification of this vulnerability is CVE-2026-4101. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. There is no exploit available. You should upgrade the affected component.

items.title: CVE-2025-66487 | IBM Aspera Shares up to 1.11.0 allocation of resources

items.content: A vulnerability categorized as problematic has been discovered in IBM Aspera Shares up to 1.11.0. The impacted element is an unknown function. items.title: CVE-2026-34455 | HiEventsDev Hi.Events up to 1.7.0 Query Parameter orderBy sort_by sql injection (GHSA-2qcp-24fh-fx6p)
items.author: vuldb.com

Upgrading the affected component is advised.
